records.question: Which countries with a life expectancy of 67.2 and a GNP old value of at most 442989.0 have a city in the Moskova district and a language spoken by at most 0.4 percent of the population, where the country code2 is exactly RU?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.code = countrylanguage.countrycode
WHERE country.code2 = 'RU' AND country.gnpold <= 442989.0 AND city.district = 'Moskova' AND country.lifeexpectancy = 67.2 AND countrylanguage.percentage <= 0.4

WHERE country.name = 'Japan' AND country.region = 'Eastern Asia'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Code FROM country WHERE Name = 'Japan' AND Region = 'Eastern Asia'

records.question: Which countries are located in the region 'Eastern Asia' and have at least one city as well as at least one countrylanguage associated with them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.code = countrylanguage.countrycode
WHERE country.region = 'Eastern Asia'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Code FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode INNER JOIN countrylanguage AS T3 ON T1.Code = T3.CountryCode WHERE T1.Region = 'Eastern Asia'

records.question: Which countries named Iran have a government form that is exactly Islamic Republic?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.code = countrylanguage.countrycode
WHERE country.name = 'Iran' AND country.governmentform = 'Islamic Republic'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Code FROM country WHERE Name = 'Iran' AND GovernmentForm = 'Islamic Republic'

records.question: Which countries in North America have the government form Dependent Territory of the UK and have Elisabeth II as their head of state?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
WHERE country.governmentform = 'Dependent Territory of the UK' AND country.continent = 'North America' AND country.headofstate = 'Elisabeth II'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Code FROM country WHERE Continent = 'North America' AND GovernmentForm = 'Dependent Territory of the UK' AND HeadOfState = 'Elisabeth II'

records.question: What country named Antarctica has a population of 0, a surface area of 13120000.0, a government form of Co-administrated, a localname of –, and is located in the Antarctica region and continent with a GNP exactly 0.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
WHERE country.gnp = 0.0 AND country.localname = '–' AND country.continent = 'Antarctica' AND country.region = 'Antarctica' AND country.governmentform = 'Co-administrated' AND country.surfacearea = 13120000.0 AND country.population = 0 AND country.name = 'Antarctica'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Code FROM country WHERE Name = 'Antarctica' AND Population = 0 AND SurfaceArea = 13120000.0 AND GovernmentForm = 'Co-administrated' AND LocalName = '–' AND Region = 'Antarctica' AND Continent = 'Antarctica' AND GNP = 0.0

records.question: Which countries are located in the Southern and Central Asia region and have cities within them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
WHERE country.region = 'Southern and Central Asia'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Code FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Region = 'Southern and Central Asia'

records.question: Which countries have at most 78.3 life expectancy, exactly 371362.0 GNP, a government form of Constitutional Monarchy, have at least one city, and have at least one countrylanguage where isofficial is 'F'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.code = countrylanguage.countrycode
WHERE countrylanguage.isofficial = 'F' AND country.lifeexpectancy <= 78.3 AND country.gnp = 371362.0 AND country.governmentform = 'Constitutional Monarchy'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Code FROM country AS T1 WHERE T1.LifeExpectancy <= 78.3 AND T1.GNP = 371362.0 AND T1.GovernmentForm = 'Constitutional Monarchy' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM city AS T2 WHERE T2.CountryCode = T1.Code) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM countrylanguage AS T3 WHERE T3.CountryCode = T1.Code AND T3.IsOfficial = 'F')
